Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13212 0 0}Oh? You appear to be harboring a new potential.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Personas you've acquired are resonating with one another, elevating you to greater heights.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13215 0 0}Oh my... You appear to have gained a new power.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}You should be able to battle more efficiently and exquisitely with your multiple Personas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}As you acquire more Personas to fill the Compendium, you'll open your mind to new battle stratagems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13204 0 0}For the time being... you do seem to wield your new power quite effectively.[n]{f 1 1}
